name: Finisher
description: Determines outcomes when a wrestler goes for a finishing move

entries.templateText: FAVORED connects with their finisher dead center — UNDERDOG crumbles and the referee counts a clean three.
FAVORED hits their finisher flawlessly from the top rope, turning UNDERDOG inside out for the definitive victory.
FAVORED hooks the arms of UNDERDOG and plants them deep into the canvas with their finisher, securing an immediate pin.
FAVORED delivers their finisher with devastating impact, knocking UNDERDOG completely unconscious to win the match.
FAVORED hoists UNDERDOG up, walks around the ring to show off, and blasts them with their finisher for a dominant win.
FAVORED catches a mid-air UNDERDOG and seamlessly transitions into their finisher, ending the match in absolute style.
FAVORED locks in their submission finisher, wrenching back with maximum torque until UNDERDOG has no choice but to tap out.
FAVORED strikes with blinding speed, hitting their running finisher on UNDERDOG to capture the standard three-count.
FAVORED cuts off a desperation comeback by UNDERDOG, hitting their finisher out of nowhere to pick up the win.
FAVORED hits their signature high-impact finisher, pinning UNDERDOG while staring directly at the commentary table.
FAVORED hits the finisher, but UNDERDOG gets a shoulder up at 2.99, causing the entire arena to explode in disbelief.
FAVORED hits their finisher flush, but UNDERDOG gets their foot onto the bottom rope at the absolute last microsecond.
FAVORED delivers the finisher, but a sluggish cover allows UNDERDOG to dramatically kick out at two and a half.
FAVORED covers after their finisher, but UNDERDOG powerfully powers out of the pin, shocking FAVORED to their core.
FAVORED plants UNDERDOG with their finisher, but UNDERDOG kicks out and instantly fires up, fueling a massive crowd chant.
FAVORED scales the ropes to mock the fans before covering, giving UNDERDOG just enough recovery time to kick out at two.
FAVORED looks down in absolute shock as UNDERDOG barely twitches a shoulder off the canvas to break up the three-count.
FAVORED hits their finisher, but UNDERDOG absorbs the impact and kicks out at one, completely paralyzing FAVORED with fear.
FAVORED tries for a lazy one-hand cover after their finisher, and UNDERDOG dramatically kicks out to keep their hopes alive.
FAVORED connects with the finisher, but UNDERDOG acts on pure survival instinct, rolling a shoulder up just as the referee's hand falls.
FAVORED hoists them up, but UNDERDOG slips down their back, trapping the leg and locking in a devastating submission hold.
FAVORED jumps for their finisher, but UNDERDOG counters in mid-air, rolling over into a deep, agonizing armbar.
FAVORED attempts their submission finisher, but UNDERDOG counters the grip and applies their own signature chokehold instead.
FAVORED charges forward, but UNDERDOG side-steps the finisher, grabbing the ankle and applying an ankle lock center ring.
FAVORED hooks the arms, but UNDERDOG uses a massive back body drop to counter, immediately transitioning into a submission.
FAVORED tries to apply their finisher, but UNDERDOG rolls through the momentum, locking in a high-torque leg lace.
FAVORED sets up the finisher, but UNDERDOG catches the arm, spinning underneath into a crossface that leaves FAVORED screaming.
FAVORED runs into the corner for their finisher, but UNDERDOG catches them, slamming them down and locking in a sharpshooter.
UNDERDOG taunts FAVORED, hits them with their own finisher, and stands tall as the crowd roars at the ultimate disrespect.
FAVORED is stunned as UNDERDOG perfectly executes the finisher of FAVORED, nearly securing a shocking pinfall victory.
UNDERDOG ducks a clothesline and hits a textbook imitation of the finisher of FAVORED, sending a clear psychological message.
FAVORED sets up their move, but UNDERDOG reverses it and hits the finisher of FAVORED on them instead, leaving them dazed.
UNDERDOG steals the spotlight by locking FAVORED in their own signature submission finisher, mocking them mercilessly.
FAVORED misses a strike, allowing UNDERDOG to lift them up and hit the finisher of FAVORED directly onto the hard canvas.
UNDERDOG plays possum, then surprises an overconfident FAVORED by delivering the finisher of FAVORED to a massive crowd pop.
FAVORED takes too long setting up, enabling UNDERDOG to counter and execute a flawless version of the finisher of FAVORED.
FAVORED whiffs completely on their high-flying finisher, crashing violently through the announcer's table at ringside.
FAVORED tries for their finisher, but UNDERDOG moves out of the way, causing FAVORED to smash into the steel ring post.
FAVORED slips on the top rope while attempting their finisher, landing awkwardly and clutching their knee in agonizing pain.
FAVORED charges for their finisher but misses completely, tumbling over the top rope and splatting hard onto the concrete floor.
FAVORED springboards for their finisher, but a technical botch causes them to crash face-first into the canvas.
FAVORED goes for the finisher, but their body gives out from exhaustion, causing them to collapse short of hitting UNDERDOG.
FAVORED throws a running strike that UNDERDOG ducks, causing FAVORED to crash chest-first into the turnbuckle.
FAVORED attempts their submission finisher, but completely loses their grip, giving UNDERDOG an open lane to recover.
An aggressive manager jumps onto the apron to distract FAVORED, causing them to break their hold and miss hitting UNDERDOG.
A rival wrestler storms the ring, distracting FAVORED just long enough for UNDERDOG to roll them up from behind.
The lights flash dramatically in the arena, breaking the focus of FAVORED and ruining their finisher attempt on UNDERDOG.
An associate of UNDERDOG grabs the leg of FAVORED from outside, stalling the finisher and swinging the match's momentum.
FAVORED argues with a loud fan at ringside, completely blowing their window of opportunity to hit the finisher on UNDERDOG.
An illegal weapon is tossed into the ring, distracting FAVORED and allowing UNDERDOG to hit a low blow out of the referee's sight.
FAVORED is distracted by a referee bump, turning around right into a sudden, opportunistic steel chair shot from UNDERDOG.
Music plays over the PA system to distract FAVORED, giving UNDERDOG a massive opening to escape the finisher.
UNDERDOG counters the finisher with a desperation lariat that leaves both wrestlers completely wiped out on the canvas.
UNDERDOG uses a sudden jawbreaker to break out of the finisher of FAVORED, buying precious seconds to breathe.
UNDERDOG throws a blind, wild elbow that strikes FAVORED right in the eye, breaking up the finisher sequence instantly.
UNDERDOG drops down and hits a desperation low blow while the referee's back is turned, completely neutralizing FAVORED.
Both wrestlers charge the ropes and execute simultaneous crossbody blocks, resulting in a dramatic double-down.
A massive mid-air collision occurs as both wrestlers attempt running finishers at the exact same moment, knocking both out cold.
Both wrestlers hit high-impact strikes at the same time, falling backward onto the canvas as the referee begins a double ten-count.
Both wrestlers collapse from sheer physical exhaustion after a grueling chain of countered finishers, unable to cover each other.
